reviews.comment:
Hasta hace un tiempo era excelente, ahora te tenés que esperar, no te ofrecen limpiar los vidrios y si lo haces vos te recriminan dónde dejas el balde o si chorreada el piso.

(Translated by Google)
Until recently it was excellent, now you have to wait, they don't offer to clean the windows and if you do it yourself they criticize you for where you leave the bucket or if it spills on the floor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpZ3FMeklBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Te ofrecen lavar los vidrios, ver agua y aceite. Como en las viejas épocas. Y funciona la app de YPF

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They offer to wash your windows and check the water and oil levels. Just like in the old days. And the YPF app works.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpcElTUlRnEAE

reviews.comment:
La consecionaria del bar cerró. Solo está abierto el taller que es por orden de llegada, y los surtidores

(Translated by Google)
The bar concessionaire has closed. Only the repair shop (first-come, first-served) and the gas pumps are open.
